parameters: As you suddenly feel dizzy, almost like reality
has been bent, you fall back on your bed and
land on a \ii[2]. You hurt your back, but
You have no idea how it got there, but you pick
It's your drawers. Take a look?
An old outfit! Might as well take it along for the ride.
It's the old piano your family bought forever ago.
Matt still plays it occasionally, but
you stopped practicing a while ago.
Try to play something you remember?
Duncan is chilling on your table.
You pet Duncan. He squeaks and nibble your finger.
You decide to respect his privacy.
Would you like to rest here?
Fido is slightly agitated. He seems
very interested in this room of the house.
ZERO'D OUT: Disables enemy \it[57] buffs, but drop rates stay increased.
You pet Fido. He roars and kneels in respect.
Coco is excited to see you again.
She tries to play the piano to impress you.
BOUNTIFUL HARAVEST: Coco's nature powers will halve all item respawn times.
You pet Coco. She jumps around about and throws
a piece of poop at the wall.
